_comment: Manual coordinate overrides for entries where Nominatim failed or matched the wrong place. Town/region centroids picked from public coffee-origin references. Format: {filename: {lat, lon, precision, note, display_name}}

IMG_0740.jpg.note: Bensa woreda centroid (Sidama Region). Shantawane WS sits in Bensa.

IMG_0742.jpg.note: Urrao town, Antioquia. Card lists 'URRAO, ANTIOQUIA'; Nominatim matched a different 'El Vergel' vereda in error.

IMG_0755.jpg.note: Embu town, Embu County, Kenya. Gakundu Coffee Factory sits in this county.

IMG_0757.jpg.note: Pitalito municipality, Huila — Bruselas is a vereda within Pitalito, the main coffee town.

IMG_0759.jpg.note: Cuilco municipality, Huehuetenango. Card says 'Cuilco Oaxaqueño'.

IMG_0764.jpg.note: Nensebo woreda, West Arsi Zone, Oromia.

IMG_0765.jpg.note: Morazán department centroid, El Salvador. La Montañita is a small hamlet.

IMG_0766.jpg.note: Gomma woreda, Jimma Zone, Oromia, Ethiopia.

IMG_0753.jpg.note: Pegasing District, Central Aceh Regency, Aceh — heart of Gayo coffee region near Takengon.

_review_notes.IMG_0748.jpg: Nominatim matched 'Puerto Limón, Putumayo' (Amazonia, far south). For a Pink Bourbon producer, this could be Cauca/Tolima instead. Leaving as-is but flagged.
_review_notes.IMG_0749.jpg: El Panal — fell back to Huehuetenango city centroid. Card variant IMG_0758 has more specific 'La Libertad' which placed at (15.51, -91.87). Same coffee, two pins ~30km apart. Could harmonize.
